title: Hybrid Retrieval Benchmark
text: A benchmark found that hybrid retrieval improved recall by +18% on question answering. However, reranking added 240ms latency under production traffic.

title: Partner Program Analysis
text: The case study reported that stronger enablement and deal registration improved partner response rates by 12% for distributors.

title: Legal QA Evaluation
text: The evaluation showed citation-grounded legal contract QA improved precision by 9 points, but limited coverage on scanned annexes remained a risk.

title: Healthcare Workflow Study
text: An experiment reduced triage documentation time by 15% when providers used structured prompts in the intake workflow.
